name: @bpmnkit/casen-worker-ai
description: AI task worker plugin for casen — classify, summarize, extract, and decide using Claude

commands.name: classify
commands.description: Classify text into one of the given categories

commands.name: summarize
commands.description: Summarize text to a given length and style

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract structured fields from unstructured text

commands.name: decide
commands.description: Make a boolean decision based on a question, context, and optional policy
